title: Pygmalion / C.R.I.S.T.A.L.L.
description: A minimally viable space of experience. The MVP is not a product or a system. It is a form of observing non-material human participation without money, coercion, or evaluation.
cta_note: These texts are not required to proceed.
mvp_not_product: This is not a product. Not a service. Not an improvement system.
mvp_version_online: MVP0.2.2.online.Here we have the old version for now
mvp_notice: Entry is a choice. Exit at any moment.
mvp_intro: MVP and a space of personal experience.
mvp_what_body: MVP demonstrates the possibility of recognizing non-material human participation without money, coercion, KPI, or obligations.
mvp_structure_body: MVP represents a complete chain of human experience: intention, action, attention fixation, reflection, and understanding. MVP is the whole chain, not a single act.
mvp_participants_body: MVP can be experienced individually or with 2–5 participants. Participation is fully voluntary. Interpretation belongs to the participant.
mvp_not_body: MVP does not fix daily results, does not impose obligations, does not rank people, and does not simulate a full platform.
mvp_ethics_body: MVP is based on voluntary participation, liberated labor, respect for human attention and time, and the principle of numerical restraint instead of digital expansion.
mvp_table_note: A kon is a moment of attention fixation. It does not measure value and does not require interpretation.
act1_desc: Order Recognition Units (R.U.) for Presence Recognition
act2_desc: Transfer gratitude and create a link in ro.DAG
act3_desc: Your reputational image on the N.O.D. Platform
registry_placeholder: The chronicle is empty — no traces yet.
manifesto_subtitle_note: For those who want to understand deeper
manifesto_idea_body: Modern systems can measure price, but poorly recognize value.
manifesto_principles_body: Voluntariness, absence of coercion, rejection of KPI-logic, and priority of human dignity.
manifesto_goal_body: Creating an environment where intangible human value can be acknowledged, recorded, and understood — without turning into debt or commodity.
support_text: Fundraising for a pilot NOD.- Platform P./ C. with a load of up to 100 million users daily.
support_text2:
Support of the Space

The Pygmalion Space exists on a strictly voluntary basis. In 2026, work continues within the established social and technical framework.

At the current stage of stabilising the "Golden Copy" of the frontend and transitioning to the distributed NOD platform, the following parameters have been recorded:

• Identification: Support for up to 1 000 individual "Open Keys" (O.K.) with data sovereignty preserved.

• Architecture: Operation of 5 "linked protocols" (::pro.1:: – ::pro.5::), ensuring the cycle of planning, recording, reflection, and social organisation.

• Throughput: Technical readiness of the node to issue up to 13 000 U.E. daily and process up to 20 000 transactions per day, without using mining or third-party validators.

This is not a requirement, a goal, or a commercial plan. It is the current technical capacity available to participants for experiencing the value of the intangible.

Interface of Interaction with Reality

To ensure the viability and development of the infrastructure within the 6th technological paradigm, the following forms of interaction are envisaged:

• Institutional Support: Submission of materials to specialised platforms (foundations, patronage organisations, educational competitions). The list of participants and partners is updated as actions are taken.

• Partnership Alliances: The possibility to establish support funds for civic initiatives or investment partnerships based on the NOD self-organisation system. This is a form of shared responsibility for preserving a space free from commercial dictate.

• Personal Contribution: Support from individuals or foundations is accepted as an act of goodwill ("Gift of Will"), which does not create debt obligations for the project, nor governance rights over the canon for the donor.

This is not a promise of growth or a search for profit-driven investments. It is one of the possible interfaces for continuing the work, where material resources ("the cart") follow the intangible value ("the horse"). The decision to participate and provide support remains with the individual.
support_intro: To continue working on the project in 2026, support is required in the form of voluntary transfers under conditions of full transparency and mutual gratitude — approximately up to 1 million rubles.
ws_intro:
Before creating a R.U., create yourself.
Your O.K. is a trace in digital sand.
ws_path_left_desc: Return to the old world of domestic duties and family ego. Biological inferno instead of human evolution.
ws_path_center_desc1:
This is not Registration in an eco_system; here presence is instituted.
Here ::YOU:: leave your trace.
ws_path_center_desc2:
Your ::O.K.:: (Open Key) is not a password,
a form of dignity in our numeric space.
It is the boundary of your presence.

Entry into the new world begins where Your choice is your trace.
ws_path_right_desc:
If you seek profit — there is none here.
Rich is not the one who accumulated, but the one who gave.
ws_footer: For the conscious 1–2%, ready for 'work of spirit'

⚠️ You are entering a space of immaterial value.
Your O.K. is an act of self-determination, not registration.

This is not a password — it is your 'numeric trace'.
